title: Poprad, Prešov Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Poprad, Prešov Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Poprad is a city in Prešov Region with a population of 51,286. The gateway to the High Tatras, Slovakia’s most beautiful mountain range, a popular base for hiking, skiing, and exploring the Tatra National Park.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
